activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of Lushkoff
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the character development of Lushkoff
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify Lushkoff’s behaviour at the beginning
Write how his character changes by the end

activities_projects.title: Sergei’s Advice
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of Sergei’s advice
steps: Find the part where Sergei advises Lushkoff to work
Explain why Sergei insists on honest work
Write 4–5 sentences on its importance

activities_projects.title: Olga’s Compassion
steps: Read the part describing Olga’s actions
Write how her behaviour affects Lushkoff
Explain why her kindness is important

activities_projects.title: Identify Important Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the major events in the story
steps: List five important events in the story
Write them in chronological order
Explain one event briefly

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect in the Story
steps: Identify two causes that led to Lushkoff begging
Explain the effects of Sergei and Olga’s help

activities_projects.title: Title Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Explain why the title 'The Beggar' is appropriate
steps: Think about the story and its message
Write 4–5 sentences explaining the title

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Analyse a dialogue from the story
steps: Choose a dialogue between Sergei and Lushkoff
Write what it reveals about their characters

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Study
steps: Select five difficult words from the lesson
Write meanings and make sentences

activities_projects.title: Compare Sergei and Olga
activities_projects.objective: Compare the roles of Sergei and Olga
steps: Write two points about Sergei’s role
Write two points about Olga’s role

activities_projects.title: Life Lesson
activities_projects.objective: Understand the lesson learned from the story
steps: Think about what the story teaches us
Write the lesson in 4–5 sentences
